<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.55.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Bug Fixes 🐞
* Fix icons not appearing by @marc0l92 in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/84
### Other Changes
* Bump word-wrap from 1.2.3 to 1.2.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/85
* Bump semver from 5.7.1 to 5.7.2 in /docs-gen by @dependabot in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/86
* Bump postcss from 8.4.24 to 8.4.31 in /docs-gen by @dependabot in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/95
* Bump @babel/traverse from 7.22.4 to 7.23.3 in /docs-gen by @dependabot in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/101
* Bump @babel/traverse from 7.22.4 to 7.23.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/102
* fix: link to standard-fields header by @SpenHub in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/88
* feat: allow to jump directly Jira search website from  jira-search  by @qu4cks4lb3r in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/98
* Set Jira Issue Status Color by Name by @ngraham20 in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/100

## New Contributors
* @SpenHub made their first contribution in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/88
* @qu4cks4lb3r made their first contribution in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/98
* @ngraham20 made their first contribution in https://github.com/marc0l92/obsidian-jira-issue/pull/100
